title: Silentium's creators
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:VuffiNew.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Vuffi Raa]] resembled the form of the organic progenitors of the Silentium.]]

The '''Silentium's creators''' were an [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] species of sentient star-shaped organics who created the sentient droid species known as the [[Silentium]]. They were possibly one of the native species of the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy]].

Their name, homeworld and history have been long lost, with their creations being their only legacy. At an unknown time, the species was wiped out by a [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] storm from a nearby [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]], though their droid creations "lived" on.

==Culture==
The species were known to have been advanced. Their droid creations resembled their star-shaped form, in much the same way that [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] created bipedal droids.

In their language, "vuffi raa" was a numeral.<ref name="Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu">''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
*The war between the [[Silentium]] and the [[Abominor]] is strongly implied to be the root cause of the technophobia of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], according to [[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace's]] endnotes for ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''.<ref name="Blog1">{{Blog|danwallace|52|Endnotes for The New Essential Guide to Droids: PART 1 OF 3}}</ref><ref name="Blog2">{{Blog|danwallace|53|Endnotes for The New Essential Guide to Droids: PART 2 of 3}}</ref>
*While traveling underneath the largest pyramid on Rafa V, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Vuffi Raa]] saw historic wall pictorials which indicated a little of the ancient history of the [[Sharu/Legends|Sharu]], and suggested they were created by a starfish-shaped precursor race. Thus there is implication that Vuffi Raa's progenitors may have been the makers of the Sharu. This also indicates that they were not only present in the unknown regions but as well in the galaxy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' {{1stm}}
